## Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant option with an "x" -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/UI update
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactor
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ Test update

## Testing Checklist
<!-- Mark completed items with an "x" -->
- [ ] Unit tests pass locally (`npm run test`)
- [ ] TypeScript compilation successful (`npm run type-check`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Tested on different screen sizes (mobile, tablet, desktop)
- [ ] Cross-browser testing (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)

## Security Checklist
<!-- MUST be completed for all PRs -->
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] Input validation implemented for all user inputs
- [ ] Sanitization applied to prevent XSS
- [ ] OWASP guidelines followed
- [ ] No sensitive data exposed in console logs
- [ ] Authentication/authorization properly handled

## Chilean Compliance
<!-- Complete if changes affect Chilean-specific features -->
- [ ] RUT validation tested with valid/invalid cases
- [ ] Currency formatting displays correctly (CLP)
- [ ] Phone number validation works (+56 format)
- [ ] Spanish translations are accurate
- [ ] Date formats follow Chilean standards (DD/MM/YYYY)
